_comment: Texas REP brand ownership. Many 'competing' plans on Power to Choose are the
same company under different brand names -- a shopper comparing the top three
results can be looking at one company three times without being told.
Only families with two or more brands are listed: a single-brand parent adds
nothing on screen. Names must match the PUCT [RepCompany] value after
normalisation (uppercase, punctuation and LLC/LP/INC/COMPANY suffixes dropped)
Ownership changes. Each family carries the source it was verified against and
the date, so this can be rechecked rather than trusted forever.

families.note: NRG's Texas brands include Reliant, Green Mountain, Cirro, Discount Power and Direct Energy. Cirro and Discount Power go further and share a single PUCT certificate (#10177) -- one legal entity, two brands.
Vistra's Texas brands include TXU Energy, TriEagle, Express, Veteran, Ambit and 4Change -- gathered up through the Ambit and Crius acquisitions.
Just Energy acquired Fulcrum Energy in 2011, bringing Amigo and Tara under the same roof.
PUCT lists 'Octopus Energy' and 'Octopus Energy LLC' separately; they normalise to one brand.
